# Chapter 7 vs 13 Bankruptcy -- Complete Comparison [2026]
> Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13 -- which is right for you? Compare eligibility, cost, timeline, and what you keep with our data-driven tool. Free 2026 guide.

## About
chapter7vs13.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13 After Divorce (2026): https://chapter7vs13.org/bankruptcy-after-divorce.html
- Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13: Keeping Your Assets (2026): https://chapter7vs13.org/ch7-vs-ch13-assets.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
